message:
🐛 Fix HardwareHealthCard pagination and node count consistency (#562)

Fixes:
1. Pagination now works correctly when switching between Alerts/Inventory
   tabs - the page validation useEffect now uses currentTotalPages which
   respects the active view mode

2. Node count is now consistent with inventory count - deduplicatedNodeCount
   uses extractHostname() for deduplication, matching the inventory logic

3. Page resets to 1 when switching between view modes

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
